# Pravin Elite Fitness

> Personal training, at-home coaching, online coaching, and Indian nutrition plans in Pune, Maharashtra. 1500+ transformations across fat loss, muscle gain, PCOS, diabetes, and general fitness.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, programs, stats, and specializations.
- [Services](/services): In-Gym, At-Home, Online coaching and Indian nutrition.
- [Programs](/programs): 45-Day Challenge, 90-Day Elite, and Nutrition-only — transparent INR pricing.
- [About](/about): Coach Pravin's story, philosophy, and certifications.
- [Calculator](/calculator): India-tuned BMI, BMR, TDEE, and macro calculator with program recommendation.
- [Booking](/booking): Book a free consultation with calendar and time-slot selection.
- [Contact](/contact): WhatsApp, phone, and contact form for a free 30-minute consultation.
